user.description: Enter the management IP (or hostname) of the Wisdom SA-3 amplifier. The WebSocket control port is 81 unless you changed it. Note: this is the management-NIC IP, not the Dante audio IP.

reconfigure.description: Update the IP address or port for this amplifier. The MAC address must match the originally configured device.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the amplifier on the WebSocket port
error.no_mac: The amplifier did not report a MAC address

abort.wrong_device: That host is a different amplifier (MAC mismatch)
